text.title: Cost-Per-DAU Defense Template Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid 1-page cost-per-DAU defense report. Subagent must satisfy this before posting to finance review.

required.field: measured value, USD per DAU per day
exactly 3 driver entries with name + percentage
name + value + citation URL or source

forbidden.pattern: peer_benchmark without citation URL or source
plan_90_day.target_cost_per_dau_usd missing OR plan owner missing

allowed-transformations.transformation: Collapse drivers with the same root cause into one entry, summing percentages.

list.item: Every required field populated with a typed value
drivers list has exactly 3 entries summing to at least 70 percent
plan_90_day has owner and numeric target
